data.title: Cameco facing delays at McArthur River mine, impacting 2025 production plans; Cigar Lake mine performance to partially offset.
data.description: SASKATOON, Saskatchewan-- Cameco (TSX: CCO; NYSE: CCJ) announced an operational update regarding its 2025 production targets. The McArthur River mine's transition to new mining areas is facing delays, impacting the planned extraction of pounds for 2025 and subsequently affecting the production forecast for the same year. Despite this setback, robust performance at the Cigar Lake mine offers a chance to offset some of the deferred McArthur River production. Cameco remains optimistic about maintaining a balanced production approach as it navigates through these challenges.

data.title: Lakefield Vet Group on Inc. 5000 list for fast-growing companies, reflects success in revenue growth.
data.description: A prominent veterinary care provider, Lakefield Veterinary Group, based in Seattle, has been acknowledged by Inc. Magazine as one of the fastest-growing companies in America. The company's inclusion in the esteemed Inc. 5000 list is a testament to its impressive revenue growth. This accolade demonstrates Lakefield Veterinary Group's dedication to offering exceptional veterinary services nationwide. It showcases the company's commitment to excellence and underscores its success in the industry.

data.title: Marvell (MRVL) stock slips post Q2 earnings report: 67 cents earnings per share, $2.006B revenue missed $2.009B.
data.description: Marvell Technology Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL) disclosed its Q2 results post Thursday's market close. The report showed earnings at 67 cents per share, surpassing analysts' expected 66 cents. The revenue for the quarter stood at $2.006 billion, slightly lower than the predicted $2.009 billion. The non-GAAP gross margin for the quarter was reported at 59.4%. For a more detailed report, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: LeMaitre Vascular (Nasdaq: LMAT) to attend 4 investor conferences in September, as announced on Aug. 28, 2025.
data.description: Today it was announced that LeMaitre Vascular, Inc. (Nasdaq: LMAT), based in Burlington, Mass., will be represented at four forthcoming investor conferences.

data.title: Pure Storage stock is soaring after beating estimates, while NetApp struggles despite also beating estimates.
data.description: Pure Storage and NetApp have exceeded expectations in their recent financial reports. Pure Storage's stock is seeing a significant increase after their results, while NetApp is experiencing fluctuations. This news was covered in a recent article by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Meadows Behavioral Healthcare appoints Dr. Aaron Wilson as new Chief Medical Officer, a double board-certified psychiatrist.
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona on August 28, 2025, Meadows Behavioral Healthcare (MBH), known for their expertise in behavioral health treatment, announced the appointment of Dr. Aaron Wilson as their new Chief Medical Officer. Dr. Wilson, a highly qualified psychiatrist with dual board certifications in psychiatry and addiction medicine, has assumed this key role within the organization.

data.title: RFK Jr. tried to remove CDC Director Susan Monarez due to disagreement on vaccine policy, but she rejected the demands.
data.description: Susan Monarez, the director, chose not to dismiss agency leaders or implement all suggestions from a vaccine advisory panel led by Mr. Kennedy, as reported by sources familiar with the situation.

data.title: Animoca's Sandbox sees overhaul as co-founders Arthur Madrid & Sebastien Borget move to new roles amid optimization.
data.description: Co-founders Arthur Madrid and Sebastien Borget of The Sandbox have assumed new strategic positions as part of a business optimization process. Sebastien Borget shared with Cointelegraph the details of this transition.

data.title: Venu Holding Corp closed public offering of 2.875M shares at $12/share, raising gross proceeds. #NYSE #VENU #UpscaleVenues
data.description: In Colorado Springs, Venu Holding Corporation ("VENU" or the "Company") (NYSE American: VENU) shared the successful conclusion of its recent public offering. This offering involved 2,875,000 shares of common stock, with an additional 375,000 shares sold due to the underwriter’s exercised option. The shares were priced at $12.00 each, resulting in total gross proceeds of approximated amount (multiply number of shares with the price per share). VENU focuses on developing and operating upscale live music venues and premium hospitality destinations.

data.title: TechnipFMC's CEO to speak at Barclays conference on Sept 2, 2025, at 1:15 p.m. ET in NY, with live webcast available.
data.description: TechnipFMC (NYSE: FTI) has revealed that Doug Pferdehirt, the Chair and Chief Executive Officer, is set to address attendees at the Barclays 39th Annual CEO Energy-Power Conference on September 2, 2025, at 1:15 p.m. ET in New York, NY. The presentation will be streamed live through the Investor Relations website. The event will not feature any presentation materials. An audio recording of the webcast will be accessible following the event.

data.title: Altcoins surge as Bitcoin dominance drops, signaling potential altcoin season. Charts show upward trends.
data.description: The market is seeing a decline in Bitcoin dominance as altcoins gain momentum. Data suggests that Bitcoin's market share has dropped to around 40%, while altcoins are increasing in value. Charts indicate a growing interest in alternative cryptocurrencies, with Bitcoin's dominance decreasing steadily. This shift highlights a changing trend in the market, with investors turning towards altcoins for potential returns.

data.title: Pilot celebrates Driver Appreciation Month with exclusive deals and a Road Warrior contest, partnering with Diesel Brothers for giveaway.
data.description: In Knoxville, Tennessee, Pilot is honoring professional drivers throughout September with a unique Road Warrior competition and special offers as part of Driver Appreciation Month. Partnering with popular TV and YouTube personalities, Diesel Brothers, Pilot is giving away a customized Kenworth semi-truck and $50,000 cash prize to the 2025 Road Warrior winner. The initiative aims to recognize the hard work and commitment of professional drivers who play a crucial role in keeping the economy functioning smoothly.

data.title: ParaZero's sales surged by 27% in the first half of 2025 compared to 2024 results.
data.description: Sales for the current period soared by around 27% when compared to the corresponding period in 2024.

data.title: Nasdaq gains moderately; Lumentum soars, Burlington and Five Below break out, Nvidia slightly down.
data.description: The stock market experienced a moderate gain, led by Nasdaq. Nvidia demonstrated bullish behavior by reducing losses, while Pure Storage showed a breakaway gap. Nasdaq was up, with Lumentum seeing a significant increase. Burlington and Five Below experienced breakouts, with Nvidia slightly lower.
